title: Heraklion heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Heraklion with a Z-Score of +3.14. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Heraklion is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.0 GG. 
 The low humidity of 22% and moderate wind speed of 9.5 km/h are exacerbating the heat. 
 The lack of heating degree days (HDD=0.0 GG) indicates that the city is not experiencing any cold stress, but the high CDD value is a major concern.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect the population and infrastructure.
